reasoning: The bearish consensus (technical + level_thesis) rests on price being 40c below pivot and failing to reclaim 735.40 resistance. However, this ignores the macro backdrop: overnight gap of +$2.60 (described by macro agent as 'significant bullish overnight sentiment'), VIX at 17.99 in neutral MID regime, and no RTH-blocking events. The technical agent even noted the ribbon is CLEAN_BULL with 31c spread — a bullish signal that was dismissed. The level_thesis bearish case requires price to stay below 735.40, but if that level flips to support, the entire bearish scenario collapses. XLE up +2.45% suggests sector rotation could support broader market. The bearish case is fragile because it depends on price remaining weak — any reclaim above 735.40 with volume invalidates it.

invalidation_scenarios.scenario: SPY reclaims 735.40 as support and holds for 15+ minutes
invalidation_scenarios.effect: Level thesis primary bearish condition fails — 735.40 flipping to support invalidates the bearish flush target 732.33

invalidation_scenarios.scenario: SPY breaks above 738.10 Carry level on increased volume (>50M shares first 30 min)
invalidation_scenarios.effect: The battle level 738.10 (3★ Carry) breaking invalidates all bearish scenarios; triggers tertiary bullish target 741.40

invalidation_scenarios.scenario: XLK data becomes available and shows >0.5% gain at open
invalidation_scenarios.effect: Internals no_trade flips to risk-on; sector rotation confirms bullish macro backdrop, invalidating bearish internal thesis

weakest_consensus_link: The bearish thesis depends entirely on price remaining below 735.40 resistance — a single technical level that, if reclaimed as support, invalidates both the technical and level_thesis bearish cases
key_observations: Macro agent is bullish with 0.70 confidence — highest conviction vote — yet consensus is bearish, underweighting the macro backdrop
Technical agent called ribbon CLEAN_BULL but still marked bearish — contradictory signal that weakens the bearish case
Overnight gap +$2.60 is 'significant bullish overnight sentiment' per macro agent but bearish agents ignored it
VIX at 17.99 in MID regime is neutral, not bearish — no macro tailwind for bearish thesis
Level thesis bearish case requires failure at 735.40, but bullish secondary scenario exists if 735.40 reclaims as support
